Good run fresh and is very well placed this level, go close.

Not the worst.

Can measure up from an ideal draw.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of three-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation seventh of 9 at Mornington Bm70 December 17 over 1500m, 4 len behind Welcometotheshow carrying 52.5kg at $4.80. When resuming last campaign second of 10 at Kilmore 3yo F Mdn-Sw October 13 over 1200m, 0.8 len behind Grinzinger Champ carrying 57kg at $7.50. Looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Has ability and sets up well here.
